decks.notes: The deck focuses on using control elements such as counterspells, board wipes, and card advantage to out value and outlast the opponent. It also utilizes cards that can exile or bounce problematic threats from the opponent. The companion Kaheera provides additional synergy and potential for a powerful late-game threat. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing its own win condition through card advantage and efficient removal spells.

This deck focuses on using the Greasefang Parhelion combo to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards to set up the combo, protect it, and disrupt the opponent's plans. By efficiently removing threats and establishing a strong board state, the deck aims to execute its combo while maintaining control of the game. It utilizes a mix of removal spells, creature buffs, and land cards to create a versatile strategy that can adapt to various matchups and situations.

This Gruul Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays with a mix of burn spells and efficient creatures to deal damage quickly to the opponent. It utilizes cheap creatures with abilities that benefit from casting spells, while also having impactful removal like Reckless Rage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of direct damage, creature combat, and tempo plays to come out victorious in a quick and aggressive manner.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by disrupting your opponent's strategy with hand disruption spells like Duress and Thoughtseize, as well as removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay. It also utilizes creatures like Graveyard Trespasser and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to pressure the opponent and generate value. The deck aims to out value the opponent by utilizing powerful creature threats and efficient removal to grind out a win. The mana base is optimized for consistency and to ensure you can cast your spells on curve.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of powerful cards to control the game and outvalue opponents. With a mix of ramp, removal, card draw, and threats, the deck aims to grind out advantages and overwhelm opponents with card advantage and powerful plays. Niv-Mizzet Reborn serves as a powerful tool for card advantage and selection, while other powerful cards like Omnath, Locus of Creation and Elesh Norn, Mother of Machines can help close out games. The deck's versatility and ability to adapt to different matchups make it a potent control archetype in Pioneer 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence using efficient creatures like Archon of Emeria, Llanowar Elves, and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben. The deck aims to disrupt opponents with cards like Skyclave Apparition and Enduring Innocence while maintaining pressure with cards like Collected Company. With a mix of early aggression and disruption, the deck looks to overwhelm opponents and close out games quickly. The inclusion of Michelangelo's Technique and Ouroboroid provide additional options for dealing with threats and pushing through damage.

The main concept of this deck is to play aggressively and quickly, utilizing cheap spells and creatures to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. Through cards like Soul-Scar Mage, Monastery Swiftspear, and Stormchaser's Talent, this deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain it throughout the game. With a mix of burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage, as well as card draw from cards like Consider and Stock Up, this deck is designed to keep the momentum going and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly applying pressure to the opponent through efficient and cheap spells and creatures, aiming to end the game as quickly as possible. It utilizes a combination of burn spells, low-cost creatures with prowess abilities, and cards that can generate card advantage to maintain its tempo. By leveraging its aggressive creatures and burn spells, the deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize their board or gain control of the game.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, and using burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to control the board and clear the way for attacks. The deck also utilizes card draw and mana efficiency with cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Boomerang Basics. The goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan, ultimately overwhelming them with damage for a swift victory.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on dealing direct damage to the opponent while maintaining board presence with creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage. Spells like Reckless Rage and Burst Lightning can help control the board and clear the way for aggressive attacks. The deck also includes card draw and looting effects to help maintain consistency and find key pieces. The mana base is designed to support a fast and consistent aggressive strategy, with options for both red and blue mana sources.

This deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a powerful control tool, allowing the player to have access to a wide range of multicolored spells. The deck includes a variety of removal spells, ramp cards, and versatile threats to control the board and outvalue the opponent. The inclusion of Leyline Binding helps to shut down opposing threats, while the companion Yorion, Sky Nomad provides additional value and flexibility. With a mix of removal, card advantage, and powerful creatures, the deck aims to outgrind opponents and come out on top in longer games.

This deck focuses on using low-cost spells and creatures to maintain a fast-paced aggressive strategy, aiming to deal damage quickly and efficiently. With a mix of burn spells, creatures with prowess, and card draw effects, the deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent early in the game and maintain pressure throughout. The mana base is optimized for casting spells on curve and the mix of card draw and interaction allows for adaptability in different matchups. The deck's synergy lies in combining cheap spells with prowess creatures to maximize damage potential and maintain board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cheap spells and card draw to trigger the Arclight Phoenix's ability to return from the graveyard. By casting spells like Fiery Impulse, Lightning Axe, and Opt, along with card draw spells like Sleight of Hand and Treasure Cruise, the deck aims to fill the graveyard with instant and sorcery cards to bring back the Arclight Phoenix multiple times in a game. The deck also includes disruptive creatures like Thing in the Ice and Picklock Prankster to pressure the opponent and control the board while setting up for explosive turns with Arclight Phoenix.

This Selesnya Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast and aggressive creatures such as Bishop of Wings, Resplendent Angel, and Righteous Valkyrie. The deck also includes cards like Collected Company and Skyclave Apparition for efficient creature removal and card advantage. The mana base is tuned to support the deck's curve, with cards like Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic helping to ramp into the higher cost angels. The inclusion of cards like Giada, Font of Hope and Inspiring Overseer also provides additional support and resilience to the deck.

This deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It includes cards that can boost the power of creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter, as well as removal spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage to clear the way for attacks. The deck also includes card draw and counter spells to maintain card advantage and protect its creatures. The mana base is built to support the aggressive strategy, with a mix of lands that can produce red and blue mana.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spell casting, utilizing low-cost cards to maintain a steady stream of threats. By combining aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage with cheap spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage, you can control the board while dealing consistent damage to your opponent. The deck also features card draw and card selection options to ensure that you always have the resources you need to maintain pressure on your opponent.
